listings.title: Kit Motor & Pulley
listings.description: Genuine GE OEM WE17X22217 Kit Motor & Pulley RoadrunnerParts Genuine GE WE17X22217 Kit Motor & Pulley (Diagram ID 630). WE17X22217 is the current service part for original GE part WE17M66. Diagram ID: 630 Product Features: - This 1/4HP, 115V motor rotates the drive belt to spin the dryer drum - The kit includes the motor, a pre-installed pulley, a wiring harness, and installation instructions - Ideal for resolving issues with a dryer that won't tumble or starts then stops Compatibility: Fits various models including: PTDS650GM2WT, DX4500GG8WW, GTDX200EM0WW Professional Quality from RoadrunnerParts We specialize in high-fidelity, verified appliance components to ensure your repair is successful the first time. Common Symptoms Fixed: Fixes dryers that won't start, motor humming but not turning, or intermittent stopping. Quality Assurance: This part has been professionally inspected and prepared for resale. We ensure every component is tested for structural integrity and mechanical performance.

listings.description: This genuine GE Appliances Dryer Timer (WE4M532), identified as Diagram ID 100, is engineered to provide precise control over your dryer's cycles. It regulates the duration of drying time, cooldown periods, and cycle completion to ensure efficient and consistent operation. Replacing a faulty timer can resolve issues such as the dryer failing to start, stopping mid-cycle, or running indefinitely. This OEM component is built to meet high standards of quality and durability for reliable performance in compatible electric dryers. Always remember to unplug the appliance before installation.

listings.description: This genuine GE OEM Interlock Switch (Diagram ID: 803) is a critical safety component designed for select GE electric and gas dryers, as well as specific dishwasher models. This switch monitors the door closure, ensuring the appliance operates only when the door is securely closed and latched. Common symptoms of a faulty interlock switch include the dryer failing to start, the dryer continuing to run with the door open, or timer displays failing to illuminate. Built to meet strict manufacturer standards, this switch is an ideal replacement part for restoring proper safety and functionality to your appliance.

listings.title: Dryer Drum Glide Bearing
listings.description: Restore smooth and quiet operation to your dryer with this genuine OEM Dryer Drum Glide Bearing (2-Pack). Identified as Diagram ID 317, these durable bearing slides are installed on the front panel to support the drum as it rotates, significantly reducing friction and wear between the drum and the housing. Over time, these glides can thin or become damaged due to heat and regular use, leading to squeaking, scraping noises, or inefficient drum rotation. This high-quality replacement part is designed to provide stability and quiet performance for your laundry cycles. Note: It is recommended to replace all bearing slides simultaneously to ensure even wear and optimal dryer longevity.

listings.title: Bearing Slide
listings.description: This genuine GE Bearing Slide (Diag ID 317) is an essential component designed to keep your dryer drum rotating smoothly. If your dryer is not tumbling properly, or if you notice squeaking or grinding noises during operation, it may be time to replace the worn bearing slide. This part helps support the drum's front edge, reducing friction between the drum and the front panel. Proper installation ensures quieter performance and helps extend the lifespan of your appliance. Please verify your specific dryer model number for compatibility before purchase.
